SUMMARY:
Artem (Ukrainian: Арте́м, romanized: Artém, pronounced [ɐrˈtɛm]) is a male given name of Greek origin, especially common in Russia and Ukraine. It is also used in Armenian with the variant of Ardem in Western Armenian.
Artyom (Артём), the Russian version of the name, is often romanized as Artem although the letter "ё" gives a [-tʲɵm] ending sound.
Artem may refer to:

Artem Vinicius Soares Dias, Brazilian soccer player
Artem Rodrigues, Brazilian lawyer and geographer
Artem Anisimov, Russian ice hockey player
Artem Bobukh, Ukrainian association football player
Artem Borodulin, Russian figure skater
Artem Bulyansky, Russian ice hockey player
